transcript.q:
Welcome, and thank you so much for coming in today. It's great to meet you. I hope you had no trouble finding us and that you're feeling comfortable.

My name is Alex, and I'll be conducting your interview today for the Software Engineer position. We're really excited to meet candidates who might be joining our team, and I want this to feel like a relaxed conversation rather than an interrogation, so please don't hesitate to ask me any questions along the way.

To get us started, could you just tell me a little bit about yourself and your background in software engineering? What has your journey looked like so far?
